name: Shanghai Baolong Automotive Corporation
summary: Shanghai Baolong Automotive Corporation manufactures and sells automotive parts and components in China. It offers tire pressure monitoring systems (TPMS) for passenger cars and commercial vehicles, TPMS service kits, TPMS OE replacement sensors, pressure and temperature sensors, rain sensors, view systems, etc. The company also provides tire and wheel service products comprising tire valves and accessories, wheel balancing weights and related tools, wheel bolts and nuts, and others; and multi-functional steel exhaust components, such as tailpipes, cones, mufflers, etc., as well as air springs, hydro-forming automotive body parts, and aluminum parts. It serves car makers and Tier 1 suppliers, as well as the tuning market. Shanghai Baolong Automotive Corporation was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
